ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "employment_status" INTEGER /* ID of the employment status */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "geographic_region" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_geographic_region FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_region") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geographic_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the employment status */,
  "status_group" TEXT /* Group to which the employment status belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the education level */,
  "level_group" TEXT /* Group to which the education level belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "geographic_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (for hierarchical regions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographic_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("geographic_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_attributes" (
  "demographic_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic attribute */,
  "demographic_attribute" TEXT /* Name of the demographic attribute */,
  "demographic_attribute_value" REAL /* Value of the demographic attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the demographic attribute */,
  "attribute_group" TEXT /* Group to which the demographic attribute belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data value belongs to */,
  "demographic_attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic attribute the data value represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data value was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_demographic_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_attribute_id") REFERENCES demographic_attributes ("demographic_attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
